description_long: This is a religious-themed doll depicting a bearded male figure dressed in a long brown robe with gold trim and a teal-blue cloak adorned with white dots. The figure holds a smaller child doll in his left arm, both with detailed facial features and realistic hair. The adult doll wears a metallic, radiating halo on his head, suggesting a saintly or holy representation, possibly Saint Joseph. The cloak drapes fully around the back, nearly touching the ground, and the overall posture is upright and dignified. The craftsmanship includes intricate folds in the garments and careful attention to the hands and facial expressions. The materials appear to be a combination of fabric for the clothing, painted resin or wood for the faces and hands, and metal for the halo.
description: A saintly male doll in a brown robe and teal cloak, holding a child doll and wearing a metallic halo. The figure is detailed with realistic facial features and intricate garments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bearded male doll's face, brown robe, teal cloak, metallic halo, and the child doll held in the left arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the drape of the teal cloak and the profile of both the adult and child dolls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full teal cloak with white dots and the back of the metallic halo, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the adult doll, the child doll's position, and the cloak's flow.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional religious attire consisting of a long brown robe with gold trim and a full-length teal-blue cloak decorated with white dots, evoking Christian saint iconography.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with the left arm bent to hold a child doll, right arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward, and legs together under the robe.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral, with closed lips, slightly downturned eyes, and a calm, serene demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, wavy brown hair with a full beard and mustache; the child doll has short, straight light brown hair.
